title: AKH® Stainless Steel Keyed Padlock | 40 mm Cast Iron Padlock with 2 Keys | Heavy Duty Weatherproof Lock for Gates, Sheds, Lockers | Secure Shrouded Shackle, Cut‑Resistant Design
features: Durable Dimensions & Material – Made from heavy-duty cast iron, this padlock measures 40mm wide with a strong shrouded shackle. Built to resist corrosion and wear, it’s ideal for long-term outdoor or indoor use.
Secure & Weatherproof Design – Features a double-locking mechanism and anti-cut shackle for enhanced protection against tampering. Comes with 2 matching keys for convenience and reliable access.
Multi-Purpose Use – Perfect for securing garden gates, sheds, storage units, garages, lockers, toolboxes, and more. Ideal for both domestic and commercial settings.
All-Weather Resistance – Designed to withstand tough UK weather, this padlock is rust-resistant and reliable in rain, frost, and damp conditions.
Trusted Everyday Security – Whether you’re locking up during holidays, protecting valuable tools, or safeguarding property year-round, this keyed padlock delivers peace of mind.
description: Keep your belongings safe and secure with our 40mm Cast Iron Keyed Padlock – engineered for strength, reliability, and versatility. Crafted from tough, weather-resistant cast iron, this padlock features a hardened shrouded shackle and double-locking mechanism for superior protection. Ideal for securing garden gates, sheds, garages, lockers, or toolboxes, it offers all-weather performance for both indoor and outdoor use. Supplied with 2 matching keys, it’s perfect for everyday security needs at home, work, or while travelling. Whether you're locking up valuables or deterring theft, trust this robust padlock to deliver long-lasting, tamper-resistant peace of mind.
